home.intro: Revand Physical Training offers self-defence, Wing Chun Kung Fu and personal training in Haarlem Noord. A place where you feel at home and can develop yourself.
home.youth.title: Youth Programs
home.youth.desc: Training for children and teenagers aged 6 to 18. Self-defence, resilience and Wing Chun tailored to their level.
home.adult.title: Adults & Corporate
home.adult.desc: Personal training, workshops and Wing Chun classes for adults of all ages and backgrounds.
about.title: About Revand
about.background: Ruben van Dijk is a personal trainer (NHA, in training) and Wing Chun instructor with over 7 years of teaching experience. He taught at Sportcentrum Wu Dae in Haarlem and delivered resilience training at primary schools in Haarlem and Amsterdam.
about.mission.title: Mission
about.mission.text: To be a haven of calm and positive energy where every participant feels at home and safe. To help people become physically and mentally stronger so they stand firm in life.
about.experience.title: Teaching Experience
about.exp.1.role: Wing Chun youth instructor — Sportcentrum Wu Dae, Haarlem
about.exp.2.role: Wing Chun adult instructor — Sportcentrum Wu Dae, Haarlem
about.exp.3.role: Resilience training — De Piramide Primary School, Haarlem
about.exp.4.role: Resilience & mental coaching — De Vlaamse Reus Primary School, Amsterdam
about.exp.5.role: Wing Chun self-defence workshop — Idemia B.V.
services.title: Services
services.youth.title: Youth
services.youth.desc: Training delivered through primary schools, after-school care, youth foundations, private sessions and birthday parties.
services.adult.title: Adults
services.selfdef.title: Self-Defence
services.selfdef.desc: Broad self-defence offering with Wing Chun as its foundation. Suitable for all levels and ages.
services.wingchun.title: Wing Chun Kung Fu
services.wingchun.desc: Ruben's speciality with 7+ years of teaching experience. Group classes and private training available.
services.pt.title: Personal Training
services.pt.desc: A personalised training plan tailored to your goals. NHA-certified (in progress).
services.workshop.title: Workshops & Team Events
services.workshop.desc: Energetic workshops for companies, sports clubs and foundations. On-site or in Haarlem.
contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have a question or want to book a session? Send a message and Ruben will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Thank you for your message! We'll be in touch soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or send an email.
contact.phone.label: Phone
contact.location.label: Location
